name: Indian Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Good rum, or dry red wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Use this recipe for either regular meat or venison.
2. Mash garlic and saute in butter. Salt the meat and flour.
3. Brown the meat well on all sides in butter. Lay the meat on a bed of sliced onion in a large Dutch oven.
4. Add the butter, spices, seasonings, rum or wine, and water to the pot. Pour enough water over the meat to make an ample supply of gravy.
5. Cover tightly and simmer for 3-4 hours, either in the oven or on the stove top.
6. If desired, add whole carrots (or large carrots, quartered) during the last half hour of cooking.
7. Add dumplings for the final 15 minutes of cooking.
8. When the roast is done, transfer it to a hot serving platter and surround with dumplings and carrots. Stir the gravy until smooth and pour over the roast. If fresh dill is available, garnish the dish generously.
